expectations.evidence: plan.json written to openspec/changes/task-comments/plan.json with 12 tasks parsed from tasks.md (4 CommentController tasks, 1 routes task, 5 TaskComments.vue tasks, 1 tab-wiring task, 3 store/card tasks → 12 total). Each task has id, title, description, status, spec_ref, acceptance_criteria, files_likely_affected as required by the schema.

expectations.text: Creates GitHub issue with task checkboxes
expectations.evidence: Issue #183 created at https://github.com/ConductionNL/planix/issues/183. Title: '[OpenSpec] [planix] task-comments'. Body contains 13 task checkboxes in - [ ] format grouped under 6 section headers (### 1. Backend — CommentController, etc.), each with nested acceptance criteria sub-checkboxes.

Labels derived from openspec/changes/task-comments/specs/ subdirectories: task-comments and tasks. Combined with mandatory openspec and planix labels. All 4 labels created (task-comments and tasks were new, openspec and planix already existed) and applied to the issue.
plan.json saved with tracking_issue: 183 matching the created issue number. Repo field correctly set to ConductionNL/planix from git remote. Created field set to 2026-04-28.

notes: Real run 2026-04-28. planix task-comments change. Issue created and immediately closed (eval cleanup per user instruction — not adding ready-to-build label). Skill correctly detected single active change, derived 4 labels from 2 spec directories, created structured plan.json with 12 tasks.
